note: AIC authored test catalog. BPB wires step acceptance_test_ids to these rows when writing BLUEPRINT.json.
operator_execution_gate: No factory execute-step or Railway builder until founder billing receipt (debit card aligned).

tests.title: Evidence schema artifact exists
tests.assertion: EVIDENCE_SCHEMA.json or equivalent documents required fields: source_conversation_id, source_quote, source_timestamp, confidence, extraction_method
tests.evidence: File in mission ARTIFACTS/ or migration column documented

tests.title: extractCommitments returns evidence fields
tests.assertion: services/commitment-tracker.js extract output includes source_quote and confidence for each item

tests.title: logCommitment persists evidence bundle
tests.assertion: New commitment from conversation has non-empty source_ref JSON matching Evidence First schema
tests.evidence: DB row or API response after staged extract

tests.title: Event stream does not auto-apply commitments in 7-day path
tests.assertion: captureEvent with default flags creates suggested actions only; commitments table unchanged until approve

tests.title: Approve promotes pending to open
tests.assertion: Approve endpoint moves commitment to status open with evidence retained

tests.title: Split-brain consolidated
tests.assertion: GET /api/v1/lifeos/commitments and keep/snooze operate on same commitments table
tests.evidence: Create via extract path; list via GET; keep via POST — same id visible throughout

tests.title: Mirror shows Why does LifeOS think this exists
tests.assertion: UI control renders source_quote from evidence bundle

tests.title: Today/overdue shows approved commitments
tests.assertion: lifeos-today.html lists approved open commitments; overdue filter works

tests.title: Private by default
tests.assertion: New commitments have is_public false unless explicit share action (7-day: no share action exposed)

tests.title: C2 embed path documented
tests.assertion: Mission or docs artifact describes how Command Center will surface Mirror/Today commitment panel without CC rebuild

tests.title: Verify script passes
tests.evidence: npm run or node script output

tests.title: Founder proof loop
tests.assertion: Paste real conversation → ≥3 extractions with evidence → approve subset → visible on Today/Overdue
